title: Elucid - AI Cardiovascular Imaging Platform
problem: Cardiovascular disease diagnosis relies on invasive procedures or expensive imaging with limited predictive value.
solution: AI-powered analysis of CT angiography to non-invasively assess plaque composition and predict heart attack risk.
technology: AI imaging analysis, computer vision, predictive modeling
varden_fit: LOW - AI imaging diagnostics. Different segment but shows AI in clinical workflow.
notes: boring_software=false, contrarian=false. AI diagnostics in cardiology. Shows clinical AI adoption.
